mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_kline_daily (code, trade_date, open, close, high, low, volume, amount) VALUES
(#{item.code}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.open}, #{item.close}, #{item.high}, #{item.low}, #{item.volume}, #{item.amount})
ON CONFLICT (code, trade_date) DO UPDATE SET open = EXCLUDED.open, close = EXCLUDED.close, high = EXCLUDED.high, low = EXCLUDED.low, volume = EXCLUDED.volume, amount = EXCLUDED.amount
